title: Flea Treatment in Uniondale, Long Island | $350-$650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Uniondale, Long Island. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for $350-$650 treatments.
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Uniondale home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Uniondale and the surrounding Long Island communities. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your property is pest-free and comfortable again.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Uniondale residents and businesses for years with reliable, affordable flea control solutions. Our licensed exterminators understand the unique challenges Long Island properties face and deliver customized treatments with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: From the residential neighborhoods near Mitchel Field to the commercial properties along Hempstead Turnpike, Uniondale's mix of homes and businesses requires expert pest control. Our team is familiar with local building types and provides discreet, effective flea treatment for apartments, single-family homes, and Nassau Coliseum-area businesses alike.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Uniondale?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Uniondale range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as our treatment targets fleas at all life stages, including eggs and larvae that may still be developing.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours after application, and our technicians will provide specific safety instructions during service.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Uniondale?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout Uniondale and Long Island, subject to availability. Contact us early in the day for the best chance of same-day service, especially during peak flea season in summer and early fall.
